name: logi-actions-ring
description: Logitech MX Actions Ring — Electron Desktop App

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:overlay" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:main"
scripts.build: npm run build:overlay && npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:main
scripts.build:main: esbuild src/main/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/main-bundled.js --external:electron --external:electron-store --external:loudness --format=cjs --target=node18 && esbuild src/preload/overlay.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/preload-overlay.js --external:electron --format=cjs --target=node18 && esbuild src/preload/dashboard.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/preload-dashboard.js --external:electron --format=cjs --target=node18 && esbuild src/preload/outsideClick.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist/preload-outside-click.js --external:electron --format=cjs --target=node18
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run electron
scripts.bubble: npm run build && node -e "delete process.env.ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE; delete process.env.VSCODE_ESM_ENTRYPOINT; require('child_process').spawnSync('npm run electron',{stdio:'inherit',shell:true,env:process.env})"
